event_comments: Reviewed newsletter canonicalization follow-up 2026-03-21 merged duplicate event 30b537a9-4ec9-5acc-8766-237f3461eba7 ("Carkeek Park, Seattle. WIOL #3. From I 5, west on Northgate Way/105th St, turn north on 3rd Ave. NW"). Reason: rollover duplicate. Notes: The November 1995 issue scheduled the Jan. 27 WIOL event for 1996, not 1995, and the same event was later re-ingested from 1996-01.
